requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety Approval — SCC-Accredited Certification Body
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全批准——SCC 认可认证机构
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全批准——SCC 認可認證機構

summary.en: Grid-tied PV inverters installed or sold as electrical equipment in Canada must be accepted by the provincial or territorial electrical authority. In practice, acceptance normally requires a certification mark from a product certification body accredited by the Standards Council of Canada (SCC) for the applicable Canadian electrical safety scope. The legal obligation comes from provincial or territorial electrical safety law and electrical-code adoption; SCC accreditation identifies competent certification bodies. CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 is the common binational product-safety route for inverters and converters, but the standard itself is a voluntary presumption or approval route unless incorporated by the authority having jurisdiction.
summary.zh: 在加拿大安装或销售的并网光伏逆变器作为电气设备，须被省或地区电气主管机关接受。实践中，接受通常需要由加拿大标准委员会（SCC）认可、且认可范围覆盖适用加拿大电气安全类别的产品认证机构颁发认证标志。强制义务来源于省/地区电气安全法律和电气规范采纳；SCC 认可用于识别具备能力的认证机构。CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 是逆变器和变流器常用的双边产品安全路径，但该标准本身属于自愿的符合性推定或批准路径，除非被有管辖权机关引用。
summary.zht: 在加拿大安裝或銷售的並網光伏逆變器作為電氣設備，須被省或地區電氣主管機關接受。實務中，接受通常需要由加拿大標準委員會（SCC）認可、且認可範圍覆蓋適用加拿大電氣安全類別的產品認證機構頒發認證標誌。強制義務來源於省/地區電氣安全法律和電氣規範採納；SCC 認可用於識別具備能力的認證機構。CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 是逆變器和變流器常用的雙邊產品安全路徑，但該標準本身屬於自願的符合性推定或批准路徑，除非被有管轄權機關引用。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety legislation and Canadian Electrical Code adoption — legal approval trigger
SCC accreditation of product certification bodies — conformity-assessment competence framework
CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 — binational standard for power conversion equipment, voluntary unless required by the authority having jurisdiction

summary.en: Chinese grid-tied PV inverters commonly rely on GB/T 37408-2019, NB/T 32004, CGC or CQC voluntary certification, and IEC 62109 CB Scheme reports. These documents can support technical review but do not substitute for Canadian approval by an SCC-accredited certification body or field-evaluation route accepted by the provincial electrical authority.
summary.zh: 中国并网光伏逆变器通常依据 GB/T 37408-2019、NB/T 32004、CGC 或 CQC 自愿认证以及 IEC 62109 CB 体系报告。这些文件可支持技术审查，但不能替代由 SCC 认可认证机构出具的加拿大批准，或省级电气主管机关接受的现场评估路径。
summary.zht: 中國並網光伏逆變器通常依據 GB/T 37408-2019、NB/T 32004、CGC 或 CQC 自願認證以及 IEC 62109 CB 體系報告。這些文件可支持技術審查，但不能替代由 SCC 認可認證機構出具的加拿大批准，或省級電氣主管機關接受的現場評估路徑。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — recommended standard for photovoltaic grid-connected inverters
NB/T 32004 — technical specification for grid-connected PV inverters
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 CB Scheme reports — useful evidence, not Canadian approval

gap.en: The gap is procedural and marking-based: a China-only GB/T, CGC, CQC, CE, or CB file is not enough for Canadian electrical acceptance. The importer needs a Canadian certification mark from an SCC-accredited body with the proper scope, or a field evaluation accepted by the local authority. Test evidence may be reused only if the Canadian certification body accepts it and resolves Canadian deviations.
gap.zh: 差距主要在程序和标志层面：仅有中国 GB/T、CGC、CQC、CE 或 CB 文件不足以获得加拿大电气接受。进口商需要由具备相应范围的 SCC 认可机构出具加拿大认证标志，或取得当地主管机关接受的现场评估。既有测试证据只有在加拿大认证机构接受并处理加拿大差异后才可复用。
gap.zht: 差距主要在程序和標誌層面：僅有中國 GB/T、CGC、CQC、CE 或 CB 文件不足以獲得加拿大電氣接受。進口商需要由具備相應範圍的 SCC 認可機構出具加拿大認證標誌，或取得當地主管機關接受的現場評估。既有測試證據只有在加拿大認證機構接受並處理加拿大差異後才可複用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal outcome: electrical equipment must be approved or accepted under provincial or territorial electrical safety rules. Standards such as CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 are voluntary conformity routes unless adopted or required by the authority having jurisdiction.
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary for Canadian entry — Chinese GB/T, CGC, CQC, and CB evidence can support review but does not grant Canadian approval.

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. A China-origin grid-tied PV inverter normally needs Canadian electrical approval from an SCC-accredited certification body before installation or sale; CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 is the expected safety route, but the standard is not itself a mandatory law.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。中国产并网光伏逆变器通常需要先由 SCC 认可认证机构取得加拿大电气批准，方可安装或销售；CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 是预期安全路径，但该标准本身不是强制性法律。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。中國產並網光伏逆變器通常需要先由 SCC 認可認證機構取得加拿大電氣批准，方可安裝或銷售；CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 是預期安全路徑，但該標準本身不是強制性法律。

requirement_topic.en: Binational Inverter Safety Standard — CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741
requirement_topic.zh: 双边逆变器安全标准——CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741
requirement_topic.zht: 雙邊逆變器安全標準——CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741

summary.en: CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 is the Canadian/U.S. binational safety standard commonly used to evaluate inverters, converters, controllers, and interconnection-system equipment. For Canada, the enforceable obligation is the electrical authority's acceptance of approved equipment under provincial or territorial law. The standard is a voluntary technical route that supports that approval; it becomes required only when selected by the certification body, incorporated by the authority having jurisdiction, or imposed as a project condition.
summary.zh: CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 是加拿大/美国双边安全标准，常用于评估逆变器、变流器、控制器及并网系统设备。在加拿大，可执行义务是根据省或地区法律取得电气主管机关对已批准设备的接受。该标准是支持批准的自愿技术路径；只有在认证机构选用、被有管辖权机关纳入或作为项目条件施加时，才成为具体要求。
summary.zht: CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 是加拿大/美國雙邊安全標準，常用於評估逆變器、變流器、控制器及併網系統設備。在加拿大，可執行義務是根據省或地區法律取得電氣主管機關對已批准設備的接受。該標準是支持批准的自願技術路徑；只有在認證機構選用、被有管轄權機關納入或作為項目條件施加時，才成為具體要求。

standards_or_laws: Provincial and territorial electrical safety law — mandatory approval or acceptance trigger
CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 — binational inverter and power-conversion equipment safety standard, voluntary presumption or approval route
Canadian Electrical Code adoption by provinces and territories — installation acceptance context

summary.en: Chinese technical evidence usually maps to GB/T 37408-2019, NB/T 32004, and IEC 62109 reports. IEC 62109 is related to PV power-converter safety, but it is not identical to Canadian CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 listing evidence, and it does not authorize a Canadian certification mark.
summary.zh: 中国技术证据通常对应 GB/T 37408-2019、NB/T 32004 及 IEC 62109 报告。IEC 62109 与光伏功率变换器安全相关，但并不等同于加拿大 CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 列名证据，也不会授权使用加拿大认证标志。
summary.zht: 中國技術證據通常對應 GB/T 37408-2019、NB/T 32004 及 IEC 62109 報告。IEC 62109 與光伏功率變換器安全相關，但並不等同於加拿大 CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 列名證據，也不會授權使用加拿大認證標誌。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2019 — recommended PV grid-connected inverter technical standard
IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 — PV power-converter safety test evidence, not a Canadian listing

gap.en: Do not describe CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 as a mandatory law. The mandatory Canadian outcome is approval or acceptance of the electrical product; this standard is the normal evidence route used by SCC-accredited certification bodies for inverter safety.
gap.zh: 不要将 CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 描述为强制性法律。加拿大的强制结果是电气产品获得批准或接受；该标准是 SCC 认可认证机构用于逆变器安全的常规证据路径。
gap.zht: 不要將 CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 描述為強制性法律。加拿大的強制結果是電氣產品獲得批准或接受；該標準是 SCC 認可認證機構用於逆變器安全的常規證據路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal outcome: approved or accepted electrical equipment under provincial or territorial law. Standard status: voluntary presumption or certification route unless incorporated by the authority, certification body, or project condition.
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary and not equivalent — Chinese GB/T or IEC evidence may support delta review but does not replace Canadian listing.

compliance_verdict.en: Informational only. Use CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 as the expected Canadian inverter safety evidence route, while keeping the legal claim tied to provincial electrical approval and SCC-accredited certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: 仅供参考。可将 CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 作为加拿大逆变器安全的预期证据路径，但法律表述应绑定到省级电气批准和 SCC 认可认证。
compliance_verdict.zht: 僅供參考。可將 CSA C22.2 No. 107.1 / UL 1741 作為加拿大逆變器安全的預期證據路徑，但法律表述應綁定到省級電氣批准和 SCC 認可認證。
